bibliographic_data.title: Inapproximability of the independent set polynomial in the complex plane

core_content.novelty_claim:
The paper establishes NP-hardness for the approximation of the independent set polynomial $Z_G( oldsymbol{
u})$ outside a cardioid-shaped region $ oldsymbol{ oldsymbol{ oldLambda}}_{	riangle}$ in the complex plane, resolving an open question posed by Peters and Regts.
core_content.key_methodology: The authors use tools from complex analysis, specifically the study of iterative multivariate rational maps, to prove their results.
